summary: Elric and his inspector friends are dealing with the arrogant magician, Merbingert LooK. Elric questions Merbingert's abilities as a magician, suggesting that he is not on par with other magicians. Merbingert gets agitated and accuses Elric of being jealous.
key_moments: Merbingert accuses Elric of being jealous
The inspector group intervenes to settle the dispute
